steps.t: Kalman can be found at the small outpost found at the entrance to Zirakzigil in Durin's Way.
The entrance to the bats' cave lies south and east of Durin's Crossing. Kalman has asked you to hunt down the bats that have infested Durin's Way.
Kalman is at the outpost near the entrance to Zirakzigil in Durin's Way, north and west of the bats' cave. You should return to Kalman with tidings of…
